_publications._publicationTitle: Hybridization Capture-Based Next-Generation Sequencing to Evaluate Coding Sequence and Deep Intronic Mutations in the NF1 Gene.

_contextSnippet: We could design a probe set that covered 90.5% of the target bases of the NF1 gene...The average of the percentage of the target covered at least once and ≥30× was 97.7% and 96.0%, respectively
details: Probe set covered 90.5% of target bases of the NF1 gene with average target coverage at least once of 97.7% and ≥30× coverage of 96.0%
